description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_TAG variable as ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}:latest. Add a single job named build in the build stage that lowercases IMAGE_TAG with `IMAGE_TAG_LOWERCASE=$(echo "${IMAGE_TAG}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')`, logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the Docker image using `docker build --build-arg=CI --pull -t ${IMAGE_TAG_LOWERCASE} .`, and pushes it with `docker push ${IMAGE_TAG_LOWERCASE}`. The job runs on every pipeline without additional rules or artifacts.
